image.title: NAK Singh, S Mittal, S Gollapudi, A Butzmann, J Kumar, RS Ohgami

item.title: A meta-analysis of SARS-CoV-2 patients identifies the combinatorial significance of D-dimer, C-reactive protein, lymphocyte, and neutrophil values as a predictor of disease severity.
